issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Only one example is provided, lacking multiple realistic demonstrations.

scenarios.name: Launch a visual browser against an existing Drizzle project
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs npx drizzle-kit studio (which reads drizzle.config.ts on http://localhost:4983) and points the user to the existing schema/dbCredentials config; baseline reaches for pgAdmin/DBeaver and never invokes drizzle-kit studio.

scenarios.name: Quickly inspect a Postgres database with no Drizzle ORM project
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented standalone form DATABASE_URL=... npx drizzle-kit studio --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4983 to launch without a config file; baseline installs a heavyweight GUI or psql instead of leveraging drizzle-kit studio standalone.
